notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds into a double play, first baseman Jake Burger to shortstop Corey Seager to first baseman Jake Burger. Max Muncy out at 2nd. Carlos Cortes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy plunked
notableEvents.detail: Athletics challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Max Muncy hit by pitch. Jeff McNeil to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Higashioka GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Higashioka grounds into a double play, shortstop Jacob Wilson to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Kyle Higashioka out at 1st.
